subcodes.first_line: O ye friends and handmaids of God! Though ye dwell in that region and we in this, yet are we neighbours [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران و کنیزان الهی هر چند در آنسامانید و ما در این سامان ولی همسایه ایم و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity
